# SM Tours & Travels

> SM Tours & Travels is a taxi and travel agency based in Mysuru (Mysore), Karnataka, India. Established in 2015, we provide outstation cab services, airport transfers, local sightseeing tours, corporate travel, pilgrimage tours, and tempo traveller hire across Karnataka and South India. Rated 4.9★ on Google with 200+ reviews. Available 24/7. Starting from ₹11/km.

- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 6363206398
- Email: smenterprises585@gmail.com
- Address: 2nd Floor, 541/1 CH10, Westcross Road, Sunnadakeri, Mysuru, Karnataka 570004
- Website: https://smtoursandtravel.com

## Services

- [Outstation Taxi Service](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/outstation-taxi-mysore): One-way and round-trip cab services from Mysore to Ooty, Coorg, Bangalore, Wayanad, Chikmagalur and other destinations. Starting from ₹11/km.
- [Local Sightseeing Mysore](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/local-sightseeing-taxi-mysore): Half-day and full-day Mysore city tours covering Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills, Brindavan Gardens, and other landmarks.
- [Airport Taxi Mysore](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/airport-taxi-mysore): 24/7 pickup and drop between Mysore and Bangalore Kempegowda International Airport. Real-time flight tracking and fixed rates.
- [Tempo Traveller Mysore](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/tempo-traveller-mysore): 12-seater and 17-seater AC tempo traveller hire for group tours, family trips, school excursions, and corporate events.
- [Corporate Taxi Mysore](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/corporate-taxi-mysore): Employee transport, client pickups, business travel, and monthly contract cab services for corporates in Mysore.
- [Pilgrimage Tours Mysore](https://smtoursandtravel.com/services/pilgrimage-taxi-mysore): Pilgrimage tour packages to Tirupati, Shirdi, Dharmasthala, Kukke Subramanya, and other temples from Mysore.

## Tour Packages

- [All Tour Packages](https://smtoursandtravel.com/packages): Curated multi-day tour packages from Mysore to Ooty, Coorg, Wayanad, Chikmagalur, Kabini, Hampi, and more.

## Popular Routes

- [Popular Taxi Routes](https://smtoursandtravel.com/routes): Frequently booked cab routes from Mysore with distance, travel time, and fare information.

## Fleet

- [Our Vehicles](https://smtoursandtravel.com/vehicles): Fleet includes Swift Dzire (₹11/km), Toyota Etios, Maruti Ertiga (₹13/km), Toyota Innova (₹15/km), Innova Crysta (₹18/km), and Tempo Traveller (₹25/km). All vehicles are AC, well-maintained, and GPS-enabled.

## Company

- [About SM Tours & Travels](https://smtoursandtravel.com/about): Established in 2015. 10+ years of experience. 15,000+ satisfied customers. Professional and verified drivers. Transparent pricing with no hidden charges.
- [Book a Cab](https://smtoursandtravel.com/book): Online taxi booking form for instant confirmation via WhatsApp.
- [Contact Us](https://smtoursandtravel.com/contact): Office address, phone, WhatsApp, and email contact details.

## Service Areas

Mysore, Bangalore, Ooty, Coorg (Kodagu), Wayanad, Chikmagalur, Hassan, Mangalore, Hampi, Gokarna, and other destinations across Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and Kerala.
